title: Ubiquiti UVC-G4-Doorbell-PS - Power Supply for UVC-G4-Doorbell
description: The UVC-4-Doorbell-PS-EU is an optional power adapter for the UVC-G4-Doorbell . Instead of using existing electrical wiring, one end connects to the doorbell and the other end plugs into a standard EU electrical outlet. Maximum distance: 6 m Standard EU electrical outlet Input: 220 - 240VAC, 50 Hz, 1A Max Output: 20VAC, 0.7A Cable length: 6 m (2) Spade wire connectors
specsSearch: Power Power [W] 14 Output Voltage [V] 20V AC Output Current [A] 0,7
